entry.title: New: CR 24-108 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 130, CD1 (2024), to amend the County Water Code by granting the Director of Water Supply conditional authority to extend water-meter reservations beyond five years, retroactive to July 1, 2019.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
